tests.title: Typing an autotrigger followed by a space expands its body in place with no popup and no accept; a second autotrigger immediately expands again (re-armed chain)
errors: Error: TauriPage command 'eval' failed: window.__PPE_E2E__.typeAutotrigger is not a function. (In 'window.__PPE_E2E__.typeAutotrigger("tii ")', 'window.__PPE_E2E__.typeAutotrigger' is undefined)
